name: Carob Date Brownie Mix
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cup Whole-wheat pastry flour or unbleached all-purpose flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the first five ingredients.
2. Store in an air-tight container.
3. Store dates separately in an air-tight container or original package.
4. To prepare brownies, preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
5. In a blender or food processor, blend 2 cups of vanilla soy milk and dates until almost smooth (small chunks of dates are acceptable).
6. Set aside.
7. Pour the flour mixture into a mixing bowl.
8. Add the date mixture and stir well to combine.
9. Spread evenly in a lightly oiled 9-inch x 13-inch baking pan.
10. Bake for 20 minutes, or until the middle is done.
11. Cut into 16 brownies.
